name: Hamburger Crock Pot Soup
recipeIngredient: Season with salt and pepper -- as desired
recipeInstructions:
1. Tear the hamburger into small pieces and place in the bottom of the crock pot.
2. Add the tomato juice to the crock pot.
3. Turn on the crock pot to low heat and let simmer.
4. After one hour, add the chopped onion and celery.
5. Let simmer for 4-6 more hours.
6. Before serving, add the noodles or rice.
7. Turn the crock pot to high heat and cook for an additional half hour.
8. Reduce the heat and serve.
